chain.notes: Mission 1 was the Polygon production era after ETHOnline/testnet origin.
chain.verification_method: Public Degen Dogs/Superfluid sources state production launched on Polygon; onchain contracts and RPC calls use chain ID 137.

chain_id.verification_method: Polygon JSON-RPC eth_chainId returned 0x89 in discovery; standard Polygon PoS chain ID.

native_gas_token.notes: MATIC has been rebranded to POL; historical Mission 1-era gas token was MATIC.
native_gas_token.verification_method: Polygon PoS native gas token convention.

production_launch.verification_method: Medium article published 2022-03-14 and Superfluid forum states launched in production on Polygon on 3.14 of 2022.
